mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, energy_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM bs_unit_energy WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit_energy (unit_id, energy_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{unitId}, #{energyId}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE bs_unit_energy SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND energy_id = #{energyId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_unit_energy SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} AND deleted = 0
